mapper.select: select * from ygt_order_candidate where ygt_order_candidate_id = #{id} for update
select * from ygt_order_candidate where ygt_oc_message_id = #{messageId} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ygt_order_candidate (ygt_oc_corp_id, ygt_oc_group_id, ygt_oc_chat_id, ygt_oc_message_id, ygt_oc_campaign_id, ygt_oc_from_user, ygt_oc_external_user_id, ygt_oc_customer_name_snapshot, ygt_oc_member_identifier, ygt_oc_msg_time, ygt_oc_original_text, ygt_oc_parse_status, ygt_oc_status, ygt_oc_review_remark, ygt_oc_reviewer_user_id, ygt_oc_reviewed_time, ygt_oc_create_time, ygt_oc_update_time) values (#{ygtOcCorpId}, #{ygtOcGroupId}, #{ygtOcChatId}, #{ygtOcMessageId}, #{ygtOcCampaignId}, #{ygtOcFromUser}, #{ygtOcExternalUserId}, #{ygtOcCustomerNameSnapshot}, #{ygtOcMemberIdentifier}, #{ygtOcMsgTime}, #{ygtOcOriginalText}, #{ygtOcParseStatus}, #{ygtOcStatus}, #{ygtOcReviewRemark}, #{ygtOcReviewerUserId}, #{ygtOcReviewedTime}, #{ygtOcCreateTime}, #{ygtOcUpdateTime})
mapper.delete: delete from ygt_order_candidate where ygt_order_candidate_id in #{id}
